notes: Game attempts to run and opens but immediately crashes. Generates crashdump.dmp and crashrpt.xml . Game is not playable
title: Radiant Defense

notes: I previously reviewed this game as unplayable but am now able to launch the game and play (about 6 hours in) using " PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command% " in launch options. The game is playable but seems to be sped up significantly like a video on fast forward.
title: Radiant Defense
